title: frontend: SimpleTable: Fix synchronous setPage(0) during render
author: ayushmaan-16

findings.description: filteredData moved to useMemo and page-reset moved to useEffect — no more render-phase state mutation
filteredData.length <= page * rowsPerPage with && page !== 0 guard is correct and loops safely
getSortData refactored to pure function — no hidden setDisplayData side effect during render
